en_title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil Runtime Revealed, and It Matches Early Audience Reactions
cn_title: Zach Cregger《生化危机》片长曝光，匹配早期观众反馈
subtitle: 短促直接的浣熊市噩梦
opus_summary: AMC影院页面显示Zach Cregger执导的《生化危机》片长1小时35分钟，与试映观众所称全程高速惊险相符。影片聚焦普通人在浣熊市灾难夜完成一项任务，而非复述游戏剧情。

paragraphs.en: The official runtime of Zach Cregger’s Resident Evil adaptation has finally been revealed by AMC Theaters, and it seems to hold up with reactions from early test audiences.
paragraphs.cn: AMC Theaters终于公布Zach Cregger版《生化危机》改编电影的官方片长，而且似乎与早期试映观众的反应相符。

paragraphs.en: As of July 15, movie-lovers can find Cregger’s Resident Evil listed on AMC’s website , which lists the flick at one hour and 35 minutes long.
paragraphs.cn: 截至7月15日，影迷可在AMC网站找到Cregger版《生化危机》页面，其中标注影片时长1小时35分钟。

paragraphs.en: Given the film comes out in September, tickets still aren’t available to buy, but you can set a reminder for when sales eventually open.
paragraphs.cn: 由于影片9月才上映，目前仍无法购票，但用户可以设置提醒，等待售票最终开启。

paragraphs.en: This runtime makes perfect sense, given Cregger’s previous comments about what we can expect from the movie, which he admitted will have less zombies than viewers might expect.
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到Cregger此前谈及观众可从电影中期待什么，并承认僵尸数量会比观众预想更少，这一片长完全说得通。

paragraphs.en: Cregger said its main character, Bryan (Austin Abrams), is pursued by a creature shown off in the trailer in his terrifying tale of survival in Raccoon City during the events of Resident Evil 2.
paragraphs.cn: Cregger表示，影片主角Bryan（Austin Abrams饰）在《生化危机2》事件期间于浣熊市展开恐怖求生，并遭到预告片中亮相的一只生物追赶。

paragraphs.en: Speaking with in April, Cregger revealed that the story is focused on “following a character from point A to point B” in a singular, focused viewer experience.
paragraphs.cn: Cregger今年4月接受[原文此处缺失内容]采访时透露，故事专注于「跟随一个角色从A点前往B点」，为观众带来单一而集中的体验。

paragraphs.en: “You go on this crazy journey, and you go through all these different environments, and things just seem to be escalating and escalating. That feels so cinematic to me,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「你踏上这段疯狂旅程，穿过各种不同环境，事态似乎不断升级、不断升级。对我来说，这非常有电影感。」

paragraphs.en: “It’s just following a different person who’s on a mission in this horrible night when things are going wrong in Raccoon City, and they’ve got to get something from point A to point B.”
paragraphs.cn: 「它只是跟随另一个人：在浣熊市一切失控的恐怖夜晚，他肩负一项任务，必须把某样东西从A点送到B点。」

paragraphs.en: This holds up with viewer feedback from early screenings of the film, with test audiences describing it as an "all gas, no brakes" thrill ride and the
paragraphs.cn: 这与影片早期试映的观众反馈相符，试映观众将其形容为一场「全程油门、毫不刹车」的惊险之旅，而[原文结尾缺失内容]。

paragraphs.en: Cregger has already advertised his own spin on the franchise as being a terrifying look into the experience of an average Joe navigating the chaos of the Raccoon City Incident, balking at retelling any of the games in the series — but die-hards shouldn’t worry, as Cregger has described himself as a huge fan of the series, and even included a few references to the source material that eagle-eyed fans have already spotted.
paragraphs.cn: Cregger此前已宣传自己对该系列的演绎：以恐怖视角呈现一个普通人在浣熊市事件混乱中求生的经历，并拒绝复述系列任何一款游戏。不过死忠粉丝无需担心，Cregger自称是系列铁杆粉丝，影片还加入了一些致敬原作的细节，已经被眼尖的粉丝发现。
